use_cases.AC1: Cart Review — user reviews cart contents and totals before checkout
use_cases.AC2: Checkout Information Entry — user provides shipping/contact info
use_cases.AC3: Order Overview — user reviews order summary, payment/shipping, and totals before confirming
use_cases.AC4: Order Completion — user confirms the order and receives confirmation
use_cases.AC5: Error Handling — invalid/incomplete input is rejected with clear feedback
use_cases.NAV: Navigation Flow — cancel/back-button behavior across the checkout flow (cross-cutting)

business_rules.BR1: All checkout form fields are mandatory
business_rules.BR2: Users must be logged in to access checkout
business_rules.BR3: Cart cannot be empty when proceeding to checkout
business_rules.BR4: Order confirmation should clear the cart
business_rules.BR5: Users can cancel checkout at any step and return to cart

tests.title: Cart displays single added item with correct name, description, price, and quantity
Cart displays multiple items with correct per-item details
Removing an item from the cart updates the list and badge count
Continue Shopping returns to Products page without altering cart contents
Checkout button from cart navigates to Checkout Information page
Cart page with zero items shows no line items and no totals
Checkout Information page displays all mandatory fields
Valid First Name, Last Name, and Zip proceeds to Overview page
Leaving First Name empty blocks progression and shows required-field error
Leaving Last Name empty blocks progression and shows required-field error
Leaving Zip/Postal Code empty blocks progression and shows required-field error
Submitting a completely blank form shows the First Name error first
Checkout Information page requires an active login session
Reaching Checkout Information with an empty cart does not block the form
Overview page shows correct item summary for a single-item cart
Overview page totals recalculate correctly for a multi-item cart
Cancel on Overview page returns to Products page (not Cart)
Overview page with an empty cart shows zeroed totals and an empty item table
Clicking Finish completes the order and shows the confirmation page
Order completion clears the cart
Back Home returns to the Products page
Browser Back button after order completion does not restore the purchased cart
Special characters and markup in Name fields are accepted (no format validation)
Whitespace-only input in a required field is treated as non-empty (accepted)
Very long input values are accepted in all three fields
Minimum boundary — single-character values in each field are accepted
Correcting a flagged field and resubmitting clears the error and proceeds
Cancel on Checkout Information returns to the Cart page with cart intact
End-to-end cancel-and-resume: cancelling at Overview and re-entering checkout preserves cart and requires re-entry of info
Browser Back button from Checkout Information returns to Cart without data loss
Browser Back button from Checkout Overview returns to Checkout Information with fields cleared
Full guest-to-confirmation happy path in a single continuous run

defects.title: Empty cart does not block Checkout Information or Overview
defects.steps: Log in with an empty cart, navigate directly to checkout.
defects.expected: Business Rule 3: cart cannot be empty when proceeding to checkout.
defects.actual: Checkout Information renders and accepts input normally; Overview renders with a zeroed item table and $0.00 totals. Neither page blocks progression.

defects.title: Overview Cancel returns to Products, not Cart
defects.steps: On the Checkout Overview page, click Cancel.
defects.expected: Business Rule 5: users can cancel checkout at any step and return to cart.
defects.actual: Cancel on Overview navigates to the Products page, not the Cart page. Cancel on Checkout Information does correctly return to Cart.

defects.title: Whitespace-only input satisfies the required check
defects.steps: Enter a single space into a required field, click Continue.
defects.expected: Business Rule 1: field should be considered empty/required.
defects.actual: The field is treated as non-empty and the user proceeds.

defects.title: No format validation on Checkout Information fields
defects.steps: Enter special characters/markup into Name fields, click Continue.
defects.expected: Business Rule 1 implies meaningful field validation, not just presence.
defects.actual: All values accepted as long as the field is non-empty — validation is presence-only, not format-based.

defects.title: Browser Back from Overview clears Checkout Information fields
defects.steps: Fill Checkout Information, continue to Overview, click browser Back.
defects.expected: Undefined by user story; noted for awareness.
defects.actual: Returns to Checkout Information with all fields cleared, requiring re-entry rather than restoring prior input.
